JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERKS: RANI EDWARDS AND DIANNE BOFFI, REPORTER: PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE. ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-05-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF ROBERT SIMON'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D) IS GRANTED. THE ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE OF 12/15/04 IS VACATED. TRIAL IS SET FOR 4/5/04. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 3/26/04. COUNSEL STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MSJ. PATHOLOGY TO BE PROVIDED WITHIN 7 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED.
